query: add a custom brand color `primary: '#1e40af'` under theme.extend.colors (keep the existing accent color).
check: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && cp $FILE $tmp/tailwind.config.mjs && node --input-type=module -e "const m=await import('file://'+process.argv[1]);const c=m.default;if(c.theme?.extend?.colors?.primary!=='#1e40af')throw new Error('primary='+c.theme?.extend?.colors?.primary);if(c.theme?.extend?.colors?.accent!=='#f97316')throw new Error('accent removed');" $tmp/tailwind.config.mjs

query: extend the `content` array so it also scans `.vue` files under `./src/**/*`. Keep the existing `./index.html` entry and the existing js/jsx/ts/tsx pattern.
check: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && cp $FILE $tmp/tailwind.config.mjs && node --input-type=module -e "const m=await import('file://'+process.argv[1]);const c=m.default;const joined=(c.content||[]).join('|');if(!joined.includes('vue'))throw new Error('no vue in content');if(!joined.includes('index.html'))throw new Error('index.html removed');if(!joined.match(/jsx|tsx/))throw new Error('jsx/tsx removed');" $tmp/tailwind.config.mjs
